reference: It looks like there is a strain or weakness in the tibialis posterior muscle, along with severe tightness in the calf muscles. Release those muscles with a foam roller after applying ice. Then gradually stretch the calf muscles.
text: It looks like there is a strain or weakness in the tibialis posterior muscle, along with severe tightness in the calf muscles. Release those muscles with a foam roller after applying ice, then gradually stretch the calf muscle.
